description: Notes in markdown, visualised as anything
config.title: NoteThink
config.trace.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the extension.
config.settings.view.type.description: Default view type. The user default applies in every workspace unless that workspace overrides it.
config.settings.view.generic.showLineNum: Show line numbers in NoteThink views.
config.settings.view.generic.watchUnopen: Watch the active viewed file for on-disk changes when it isn't open in a text editor (refreshes the viewer when another tool edits it).
config.settings.view.generic.openNewEdit: When you click a note and no editor is open beside the NoteThink view, open the note in a new editor group. When off, clicking a note never spawns a new editor group.
config.settings.view.specific.kanban.col: Kanban column order (raw status slugs like 'code-review' or 'done'). Columns not in the list appear after, sorted alphabetically with 'untagged' last.
config.settings.view.specific.kanban.ani: Animate passive kanban transitions (cards moving as another tool or the editor changes their status) with a brief slide.
config.settings.files.includeFilter.desc: Glob of files to include in folder mode.
config.settings.files.excludeFilter.desc: Glob of files to exclude in folder mode.
config.settings.files.maxNotesPerFile.de: Cap on stories taken from each source file when merging the folder aggregate.
